description:
🕒 16:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/cockroach/

Cockroaches get a bad rap, but did you know they play an important role in nature? Join cockroach-loving guides to discover the surprising side of these everyday creatures. Once you understand their role and how they live, you might see them differently when you encounter one at home.

【Fee】
Adults: ¥6,000 | Students: ¥5,000 | Preschool: ¥3,000
(Includes guide, insurance, materials)

【Capacity】
15 people

【Guide】
Mori no Field Gakusha staff

【What to bring】
Drink, flashlight, rain gear, gloves

【More information】
Mori no Field Gakusha website: https://morinomanabiya168.wixsite.com/website
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分
